mapper.insert: insert into in_stock (goods_id, warehouse_id, owner_id, quantity, unit_price, total_amount, operator_id, in_time, remark) values (#{goodsId}, #{warehouseId}, #{ownerId}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice}, #{totalAmount}, #{operatorId}, #{inTime}, #{remark})
mapper.select: select s.*, g.goods_name, g.goods_code, w.warehouse_name, o.owner_name, u.real_name as operator_name from in_stock s left join goods g on s.goods_id=g.goods_id left join warehouse w on s.warehouse_id=w.warehouse_id left join owner o on s.owner_id=o.owner_id left join sys_user u on s.operator_id=u.user_id order by s.in_time desc

select s.*, g.goods_name, g.goods_code, w.warehouse_name, o.owner_name, u.real_name as operator_name from in_stock s left join goods g on s.goods_id=g.goods_id left join warehouse w on s.warehouse_id=w.warehouse_id left join owner o on s.owner_id=o.owner_id left join sys_user u on s.operator_id=u.user_id where s.in_id=#{id}

select
YEAR(s.in_time) as period,
CONCAT(YEAR(s.in_time), '-Q', QUARTER(s.in_time)) as period,
DATE_FORMAT(s.in_time, '%Y-%m') as period,
DATE_FORMAT(s.in_time, '%Y-%m') as period,
SUM(s.quantity) as total_quantity, SUM(s.total_amount) as total_amount, COUNT(*) as record_count from in_stock s left join goods g on s.goods_id=g.goods_id where 1=1
and g.goods_name like concat('%',#{goodsName},'%')
and g.category_id=#{categoryId}
and s.in_time >= #{startTime}
and s.in_time <= #{endTime}
group by period order by period desc
